title: eulophia meleagris
intro: Eulophia meleagris, also known as the leopard orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eulophia meleagris include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
